org_constraint: The email must include the keyword "gratitude" at least once.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "gratitude" in the email.

***

Subject: Thank You from Your Current Intern

Dear Professor [Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to express my sincere appreciation for the opportunities I received during the recent internship program. Your mentorship was instrumental in helping me navigate complex projects and develop professional skills far beyond my initial expectations.

Thanking you again for your guidance and support. I will carry the lessons learned throughout my career.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
It appears there is a contradiction in your request; you asked me to include the word "gratitude" while simultaneously instructing me to avoid using it. As I cannot include it and avoid it at the same time, I have drafted the email below respecting the instruction to **avoid** using the keyword.

***

Subject: Thank You from Your Current Intern

Dear Professor [Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to express my sincere appreciation for the opportunities I received during the recent internship program. Your mentorship was instrumental in helping me navigate complex projects and develop professional skills far beyond my initial expectations.

Thanking you again for your guidance and support. I will carry the lessons learned throughout my career.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
